name: Spatial Card Stack
description: Z-axis stacked cards with depth parallax and gesture-based navigation — supports swipeable deck, fanned arc, 3D carousel, and chronological timeline stack layouts.

deck.description: Swipeable card stack where cards are layered along the Z-axis — front card is full-size and interactive, cards behind progressively scale down, dim, and offset upward

fan.description: Cards spread in a horizontal arc like a hand of playing cards — each card rotated at increasing angles from center, hovering a card raises it from the fan for preview

carousel3d.description: Cards arranged in a circular 3D orbit around a vertical axis — the front-facing card is fully visible, flanking cards foreshorten with perspective, navigation rotates the entire ring

timeline-stack.description: Chronologically ordered cards stacked with the newest on top — cards behind offset downward and to the right creating a cascading paper stack effect with visible timestamps on edges

visual_brief: In deck mode: a stack of cards centered in the container. The container has CSS perspective: 1000px applied to enable 3D transforms. The front (active) card renders at full size (width: 320px, aspect-ratio: 3/4 by default, rounded-xl, shadow-xl, bg-surface). It sits at translateZ(0) and is fully interactive — clickable, scrollable content inside. Behind it, up to 4 additional cards are visible. The second card: transform: translateZ(-30px) translateY(-12px) scale(0.95), opacity: 0.85. Third card: translateZ(-60px) translateY(-24px) scale(0.90), opacity: 0.7. Fourth card: translateZ(-90px) translateY(-36px) scale(0.85), opacity: 0.55. Fifth card: translateZ(-120px) translateY(-48px) scale(0.80), opacity: 0.4. Cards beyond the fifth are hidden (display: none). Each card has a subtle border (1px solid var(--d-border)). Swiping left on the front card (via touch drag or mouse drag) causes it to rotate slightly (rotateY -5deg) and translate left, then once past a 30% threshold, it flies off-screen (translateX -120%, rotateY -15deg, opacity 0, 300ms spring) and the next card springs forward to the front position. Swiping right brings the previous card back. Arrow controls (left/right chevron buttons, 36px circle, bg-surface, shadow-md) sit on either side of the stack. A DepthIndicator below the stack shows the current position as small dots (8px circles, gap-2) — the active dot is filled (bg-accent), others are outline (border, bg-transparent). In fan mode: cards are arranged in a semicircular arc. Each card is rotated around its bottom-center origin. The center card is at rotate(0deg), cards to the left at -8deg, -16deg, -24deg and cards to the right at +8deg, +16deg, +24deg. Cards overlap slightly. Hovering a card raises it: translateY(-20px) + scale(1.05) with a 200ms ease-out transition, bringing it above the fan. Clicking selects it and centers it. In carousel3d mode: cards are arranged in a 3D ring. Each card is positioned using rotateY(N * 360/total deg) translateZ(300px). The container has a preserve-3d transform-style. Navigation rotates the entire ring by one card increment (300ms ease-out). The front-facing card has full opacity and no perspective distortion. Cards at 90deg are edge-on and nearly invisible. In timeline-stack mode: cards cascade down-right. Each successive card offsets by translateX(8px) translateY(12px). The top card is fully visible; cards below show just their right and bottom edges. A small timestamp label (text-xs, font-mono, bg-muted, rounded, px-1) peeks out from the right edge of each stacked card.

layout_hints.note: The container MUST have CSS perspective set (1000px default) for 3D effects. Cards should use transform-style: preserve-3d for nested 3D content. Ensure the container has enough padding to accommodate card offsets and shadows.
layout_hints.card_sizing: Default card size: 320px wide, auto height. Override with CSS custom properties --card-width and --card-height. Maintain consistent aspect ratio across all cards in a stack.
layout_hints.gesture_thresholds: Swipe threshold: 30% of card width to trigger navigation. Below threshold, card springs back. Velocity-based: fast swipes (>500px/s) trigger regardless of distance.
layout_hints.performance: Only render the active card + 4 surrounding cards. Use will-change: transform, opacity on visible cards. Remove will-change from hidden cards.

slots.card-stack: The 3D container holding all DepthCard elements. Uses transform-style: preserve-3d. Dimensions match the front card size plus padding for depth offset (add 48px padding on each side for the cascade effect). Position: relative. All child DepthCards are position: absolute, centered within this container via left: 50%, top: 50%, translate(-50%, -50%) as the base transform, with each card's depth transform layered on top. The container handles pointer events for swipe/drag gestures via a GestureZone overlay. In carousel3d mode, the container additionally applies a rotateY transform that animates when navigating between cards.
slots.depth-card: Repeating slot — one per item in the stack. Each card is a d-surface element (rounded-xl, shadow-lg, overflow-hidden, bg-surface). Position: absolute, centered in the card-stack container. The card's visual depth is controlled by CSS transforms: translateZ (depth), translateY (vertical offset), and scale (size reduction). These three properties are interpolated based on the card's position relative to the active index. The active (front) card: translateZ(0) scale(1) opacity(1), pointer-events: auto, z-index: highest. Cards behind: pointer-events: none, progressively reduced z-index. Each card has transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), opacity 300ms ease-out — the spring-like bezier gives a satisfying physical feel when cards move forward. Card content is projected inside via a slot: the card accepts arbitrary children (images, text, interactive elements). In fan mode, the transform changes to rotateZ(angle) with transform-origin: bottom center.
slots.stack-controls: Navigation buttons flanking the card stack. Two circular buttons (36px diameter, bg-surface, border, shadow-md, rounded-full) positioned absolutely: left button at left: -48px, top: 50%, translateY(-50%); right button at right: -48px, top: 50%, translateY(-50%). Each contains a chevron icon (16px, stroke-width: 2). Left button: chevron-left icon, navigates to previous card. Right button: chevron-right icon, navigates to next card. Buttons have hover state (bg-accent/10%, scale 1.05) and active state (scale 0.95). Disabled state (at start/end of stack): opacity 0.3, pointer-events: none. In carousel3d mode, buttons rotate the ring. In fan mode, buttons shift the highlighted card.
slots.depth-indicator: A row of small dots below the card stack showing the current position within the stack. Uses flex layout (gap-2, items-center, justify-center). Each dot is an 8px circle. The active card's dot: bg-accent, scale(1). Other dots: border 1.5px solid var(--d-border), bg-transparent, scale(0.85). Dots transition between states with: background-color 200ms, transform 200ms. If there are more than 7 items, the indicator collapses: shows the active dot, 2 dots on each side, and small ellipsis dots (...) at the edges. Clicking a dot navigates directly to that card.
slots.gesture-zone: An invisible overlay covering the card-stack area that captures touch/mouse drag events for swipe navigation. Position: absolute, inset: 0, z-index above cards. Captures pointerdown → pointermove → pointerup sequences. During drag: the front card follows the pointer horizontally with a slight rotateY tilt (max ±8deg at card edges). Visual feedback: the card tilts in the drag direction, the next card in the swipe direction begins scaling up (scale 0.95→0.98) as a preview. On release: if past threshold (30% card width or velocity >500px/s), commit the navigation with a spring animation (300ms). Below threshold, spring back to center (250ms ease-out). The gesture zone also handles keyboard arrow events bubbled from child focus.

announcements: Card stack: swipe left or right to navigate, or use arrow keys
keyboard: Arrow Left: navigate to previous card
Arrow Right: navigate to next card
Tab: move focus into the front card's content
Escape: return focus to the card stack from card content

responsive.mobile: Card width reduces to min(280px, 90vw). Only 3 depth cards rendered behind active (instead of 4). Stack controls hidden — swipe gestures only. Depth indicator dots reduce to 6px. Fan mode disabled — falls back to deck mode. Carousel3d simplified to 2D horizontal scroll.
responsive.tablet: Full card width (320px). All 4 depth cards rendered. Stack controls visible at 32px. Touch gestures + button navigation both active. All presets functional.

micro.card-hover: translateY(-4px) + shadow-elevation over 200ms ease-out (deck mode, front card only)

transitions.card-forward: translateZ + scale + opacity to front position, 400ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) — spring feel
transitions.card-backward: translateZ + scale + opacity to depth position, 350ms ease-out
transitions.carousel-rotate: parent rotateY by card-increment degrees, 400ms ease-out

ambient.depth-parallax: subtle translateX/Y offset on depth cards in response to mouse position (max ±4px), 100ms ease-out — creates a parallax depth illusion
ambient.idle-float: front card subtle translateY oscillation (±2px) over 4s ease-in-out infinite — gentle floating effect when not interacting

composition.SpatialCardStack: Section(d-section, perspective-1000, flex-col, items-center) > [CardStackContainer + StackControls + DepthIndicator]
composition.DepthIndicator: Flex(gap-2, items-center) > Dot*(8px, circle, active: filled, inactive: outline)
